name: Invesco Perpetual Select Trust plc - Managed Liquidity Share Portfolio
summary: Invesco Perpetual Select Trust plc - Managed Liquidity Share Portfolio is an investment trust that aims to preserve capital and provide a high level of liquidity by investing primarily in cash, near cash and short-dated fixed income securities. The trust seeks to achieve a return in excess of cash rates. It is managed by Invesco Fund Managers Limited.
